hooks.command: f=$(sed -nE 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"([^"]*)".*/\1/p' | head -1); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) [ -f "$f" ] && lines=$(wc -l < "$f") && [ "$lines" -gt 500 ] && echo "[file-line-limit] $f has $lines lines (>500) - split into smaller modules per project policy" >&2 ;; esac; exit 0
